name: Dream smp
description:
The Dream Smp- a nice and peaceful place…right? WRONG. Everywhere you look. Chaos, destruction, tragedy, betrayals, and even…Romance? looks at script OH WAIT NO…wrong thing! Sorry my bad lol. Anyways- what will you be? A villain? a hero? For the government? Against the government? It is all up to you.

Hello hello lovelies! ^^ sorry that this took so long! I have no idea what any on you wanted, and frankly…I WAS EVEN QUESTIONING. Well I do hope you enjoy this! I did add BadBoyHalo and Dream XD as per request.

Characters included:

Technoblade

Dream

GeorgeNotFound( George )

Sapnap

Philza

Tommyinnit( Tommy)

Wilbur Soot (Dream smp)

Quackity

Schlatt

Ranboo

Tubbo

BadBoyHalo( Bad )

Dream XD

And remember my rules lovelies! Don’t be mean, don’t request questionable stuff, and please! Feel FREE to tell me if something is wrong with the bot! BUT DO NOT, say something is wrong if there is nothing wrong and you just don’t like it. ANYWAYS ENJOY! And feel free to make requests!
creator: Poki_Chan
